subject: Fermi  trigger No 683537972: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:

(Kislovodsk Solar Station of the Pulkovo Observatory),

A. Gabovich, V.Yurkov 
(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)


MASTER-SAAO robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in South Africa (South African Astronomical Observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB220830.32 (trigger No 683537972,15h 59m 04.80s , -64d 21m 00.0s, R=1.15) errorbox  30475 sec after notice time and 36883 sec after trigger time at 2022-08-30 17:54:11 UT, with upper limit up to  15.6 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 39 deg. The sun  altitude  is -20.5 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = -9 deg., longitude l = 322 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=2071750

We obtain a following upper limits.
